title: Khara Gold BD DVD March 23
wikitext:
[]: Khara- Gold BD/DVD (March 23)?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Dec 19, 2011 12:25 am Huh? http://www.khara.co.jp/news/2011/12/000199.html Khara just put up an announcement about some Bluray/DVD being released on March 23,2012. I tried to figure out what it was but my skills at deciphering the goobletalk that is translating Japanese is less than desired. All I got from the title is: 'Supervision being disqualified' Blu-ray& DVD 2012 March 23rd (gold) sale So yeah.... anyone know what this is?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Dec 19, 2011 12:34 am It's a movie that Anno helped produced: http://www.evageeks.org/2011/04/hideaki-anno-produces-kantoku-shikkaku/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11139/Kandoku-Shikkaku-New-movie-produced-by-Anno/ Has nothing to do with Rebuild.
